violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Unable to verify serve safe was renewed.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw bacon and eggs above buns and butter in the main refrigerator. Raw hamburger above vegetables in the gray refrigerator.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing a turkey in the refrigerator not working properly at 55 F. Turkey needs moved to one of the refrigerators that's working properly.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Several containers in the refrigerators not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Entire kitchen and equipment needs deep cleaning. Dish washing area is cluttered and in need of cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Drainboard/rack/table space was insufficient to accommodate equipment/utensils. -Whole dish washing area is cluttered and stacked with dirty dishes. Nowhere to put clean dishes.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -3 comp sink faucet is spraying and leaking around the base.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire kitchen in need of cleaning.

General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. -Major clutter in the kitchen and dish washing area. Refrigerator that's not working properly and only being used to improperly thaw needs to be fixed or removed.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Unable to verify Alex took the test.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Package of raw beef sitting on a package of raw chicken above lettuce in the black refrigerator.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -North refrigerator in the kitchen is not working. Facility discarded all items.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Several containers in the refrigerators not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -All equipment in the kitchen and dish washing area needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and walls throughout need cleaned.
General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. -Kitchen is cluttered with excessive items.
